title: Enarthrocarpus lyratus
taxonomy: Enarthrocarpus lyratus is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a succulent plant native to South Africa. The plant is further classified into the genus Enarthrocarpus, which is a small group of succulent plants. The Brassicaceae family is a large group of flowering plants that includes many other species of succulents and non-succulents. Enarthrocarpus lyratus is closely related to other succulent plants in the same family, such as the genus Cynoglossum.
